User.title: User
User.description: A participant in the Prode game.

Prediction.title: Prediction
Prediction.description: A user's predictions for the tournament.

uid.description: Firebase Auth UID of the predictor

groups.description: Map of group letter to array of 4 team names in predicted order

specials.description: Map of special question keys to string answers

knockouts.description: Map of knockout stages to array of advancing teams

isLocked.description: Whether the prediction is locked and cannot be edited

TournamentResult.title: TournamentResult
TournamentResult.description: The actual results of the tournament, used to calculate points.

groups.description: Map of group letter to array of 4 team names in actual order

specials.description: Map of special question keys to actual string answers

knockouts.description: Map of knockout stages to array of actual advancing teams

League.title: League
League.description: A private or public tournament/league created by a user.

createdBy.description: Firebase Auth UID of the creator

members.description: Array of Firebase Auth UIDs of members

isPublic.description: Whether the league is public or private

FriendRequest.title: FriendRequest
FriendRequest.description: A pending friend request between two users.

Friendship.title: Friendship
Friendship.description: An established friendship between two users.

Duel.title: Duel
Duel.description: A challenge between two users on a specific match or group.

A.description: Count of votes for Home Win (Team A)

B.description: Count of votes for Away Win (Team B)

total.description: Total count of votes for the match

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and their calculated total points.

/predictions/{userId}.description: Stores each user's predictions. Document ID matches the user's UID.

/results/actual.description: Singleton document storing the actual tournament results.

/statistics/matches.description: Stores aggregated prediction stats for every match ID.
